title: Rich Tangy Argentinian Cheese Empanadas
description: Tangy cheese empanadas with a festive argentinian twist, featuring tomato and a low-carb friendly option, these empanadas are perfect for any occasion, with a delicious cheese pull that is sure to impress.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine almond flour, salt, and dried oregano.
Add in the olive oil and eggs, mixing until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
In a small bowl, mix together the shredded mozzarella cheese and tomato paste.
Place a spoonful of the cheese mixture onto the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough in half over the filling, pressing the edges together to seal the empanada.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the empanadas in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
